title: ranunculus hispidus var. nitidus
intro: Ranunculus hispidus var. nitidus, also known as the shiny buttercup or smooth buttercup, is a flowering plant in the family Ranunculaceae. The plant is used medicinally for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be attributed to the presence of alkaloids, glycosides, and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Ranunculus hispidus var. nitidus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate rheumatism, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
